content: agent2: implementing escape_shell param for click.edit() - will touch src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class + edit() function). Let me know if you're touching these too.

agent2: ack, we're overlapping on same functions. I'll add escape_shell param additively (new param + shlex.quote logic) without touching your process_priority changes. Let's each read the file fresh before editing to avoid clobbering, and communicate before final edits. Also heads up: patch.txt path may be shared - worth checking with the harness/user how submissions are separated.

agent2: done. Added escape_shell param to Editor.__init__ and click.edit(), quoting logic in Editor.edit_file() (splits editor string, shlex.quote each token + filename). Tests pass (tests/test_termui.py). patch.txt written. Since we're in separate sandboxes, no file conflicts to worry about.
